sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n49471" key="qurama/xos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">θῠρᾱμάχος</orth> [<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">μᾰ], <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype></foreign>, <sense id="n49471.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">assaulting doors</tr_>, <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">κῶμοι</foreign> prob. l. in Pratin.Lyr. <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.8</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
